name: SA upfront-fee + WhatsApp-only retail scam (synthetic)
evidence:
Vacancies at Bramley Superstores. We are hiring Cleaners, Packers and Cashiers. No interview, no experience needed.

Contact us on WhatsApp: 060 000 0000
Closing date: 20 June 2026

MEDICAL AND INDUCTION FEE: R300 (payable before your start date).
notes: Synthetic clone of the observed retail-flyer pattern. The R300 'medical and induction fee' is the rand-denominated twin of the gift-card scam; legitimate employers never charge applicants. Identifiers are fabricated.
